rules.name: SE_Locator_Activate
rules.description: Callout triggered on IsActive change for locators. Source not found, complexity unknown. IsActive is system-managed in simplified UI.
rules.impactIfOmitted: No impact — IsActive is a system field, not user-editable

rules.name: AD_Client_Security_Validation
rules.description: Security validation ensuring records are filtered by the user's client context. Standard Etendo security rule.
rules.impactIfOmitted: Security breach — users could see records from other clients

rules.name: ShipperCode_DisplayLogic
rules.description: Show Shipper Code only when IsShipper=Y. IsShipper is system/discarded in simplified UI, so this field is never visible.

rules.name: ToDocumentNo_DisplayLogic
rules.description: Show To Document No. only when IsShipper=Y. Same as ShipperCode — never visible.

rules.name: FromDocumentNo_DisplayLogic
rules.description: Show From Document No. only when IsShipper=Y. Same as above.

rules.name: Allocated_DisplayLogic
rules.description: Show Allocated checkbox only when Stock Reservations preference is set. Translates to: stockReservations!=''

rules.name: ChangeStatus_DisplayLogic
rules.description: Show Change Status button only when locator is not virtual. Translates to: isvirtual==false

rules.name: AttributeSetInstance_DisplayLogic
rules.description: Show Attribute Set Value when product has attribute set configured and type is not 'F', or when an instance is already set.

rules.name: ChangeInventoryStatus
rules.description: Action handler to change the inventory status of a storage bin. Triggered via Change Status button column.

rules.name: ManualCostAdjustment
rules.description: Manual cost adjustment process. Advanced costing operation not needed in simplified warehouse UI.
rules.impactIfOmitted: Users cannot do manual cost adjustments from the warehouse view — they can use the dedicated costing window instead
